title: Roeselare, West Flanders — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Roeselare, West Flanders: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Roeselare is a city in West Flanders with a population of 63,000. A vibrant West Flemish city known for its food industry, cycling culture, and the annual Rodenbach bicycle race.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
